engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is deciding whether to attend a festival — the decision is made by browsing photos, festival zones/experiences, dates, free-entry, and directions to the venue. That is checking out a PLACE, not evaluating a thing or trusting a firm.

goal.one_action: Get people to attend the festival — driving to directions/schedule and, secondarily, buying external concert/after-party tickets and downloading the festival app
goal.delegated_to: google-maps, JPM Events ticket gateway, app store

structure.archetype_note: Multi-page WordPress festival site; home is a long zone/experience showcase, plus schedule, contact (departmental mailto directory), and section pages for zones/projects.

mapped.observed_as: What to Expect at Taste of the Caribbean?
Festival Zones & Experiences - Where to Join the Fun? (Concert/Latin/Soccer/Movie/Rum/Kids zones)
NEW Concert Zone, every evening! (ticket links Thu-Sun)
Why You Shouldn't Miss Taste of the Caribbean?
Festival Site Address + map + departmental contacts

unmapped.observed: Departmental contact directory (Production & Bookings, Internship Programs, Marketing/Sponsorship/Media, Vendors/Kiosks, Volunteers — each a separate mailto)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A multi-audience B2B contact routing list (partners, vendors, volunteers, press) is not a single lead/contact block; it segments inquiries by department

unmapped.observed: One Love Project promo (community/social-impact initiative with View More)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A cause/community-project promo tile is neither a product feature nor testimonial proof

proposed_new.name: event-listings
proposed_new.evidence: Nightly concert zone with per-day ticket links (Thu-Sun) and a Buy Tickets CTA routing to the external JPM Events gateway; a dated schedule of shows each handing off to external ticketing.

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full; all 3 core pages captured with rich sections, CTAs, nav, social, and embeds — clear festival/place archetype.

gap_findings: Festival/event sites have MANY parallel CTAs (directions, tickets, app download, per-department contact, follow) — the single one_action model must accommodate an event whose primary conversion is 'attend' with several equal secondary redirects.
A multi-audience departmental contact directory (vendors, volunteers, sponsors, press, internships) is a recurring pattern not expressible as a single contact/leadForm section.
event-listings (dated ticket-redirect schedule) remains outside the closed capability vocab.
